chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1265 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.4995/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 09.09.2025 Petitioner Afaque Ahmed present in-person Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General ************** Learned AAG has filed parawise comments on behalf of respondents No.6 to 10 under cover of his statement, same are taken on record. He submits that an alternate remedy is available to the petitioner by filing a representation under Regulation 161 of the Sindh Public Service Commission (Recruitment Management) Regulations, 2023. After such submission, the petitioner, who is present in Court, does not press the instant Constitution Petition while submitting that he will approach and file a representation under Regulation 161 of the Sindh Public Service Commission (Recruitment Management) Regulations, 2023, subject to condonation of limitation. In view of the above, the present Constitution Petition stands disposed of along with the pending application. However, the petitioner may approach the competent forum by filing a representation under Regulation 161 of the Sindh Public Service Commission (Recruitment Management) Regulations, 2023, and the period of limitation shall run from today. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
